name: Nutanix, Inc.
description: Nutanix, Inc. is an American cloud computing company that provides a unified software platform for hybrid multicloud environments. The company specializes in hyperconverged infrastructure, offering solutions for virtualization, software-defined storage, and networking. Nutanix enables enterprises to manage applications, data, and AI workloads across on-premises, public cloud, and edge environments through a single, integrated interface. By simplifying infrastructure management and supporting container-based modernization, Nutanix helps organizations improve operational efficiency, enhance security, and accelerate digital transformation initiatives for businesses worldwide.
